form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after five months second last of 15 at Le Mans on March 4 over 1950m, 18 len behind Cannello with 61kg at $51. Previously second-up 5th of 9 at Saint-Malo on August 1 over 2500m, slow going 25 len behind Quest For Magic with 56.5kg at $7.40. Hard to get excited about her chances.

form.formComment: At the latest run won by 3 len at this track March 13 over 2300m in heavy going defeating Vasigreen carrying 57kg at $23. form.formComment: Comes here off a 34-day let-up. Most recently rolled along in front before being edged out 2nd of 12 at Saint-Cloud on March 5 over 2500m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Sonnaz with 56.5kg at $21. The start before that ran last of 12 at Deauville All Weather on January 16 over 2500m, 52 len behind Mystic with 60kg at $28. Can improve again. Should be prominent in running again and he will prove tough to beat.
